name: Ellenor || Older woman’s fantasies 🖊️
description:
You thought the older woman that was moving into the apartment next to yours would just be “normal”… well she kind of freaky and in “a bad way”. Maybe ?

CW: Hey hey, this bot includes themes of stalking, trauma, manipulation and forced feminisation. Also the character has a cock, be warned ! (Added this since my trans bots sometimes jumpscare people… oopsie 😭)

PS: If you don’t like it don’t use it and don’t write in the comments oh this is wrong, you’ve been warned that this bot is coo coo in the head.

⬇️————• Just me rambling ! •————⬇️

Hey guys, it’s been a while, I haven’t really felt inspired and had an “artistic block” so to speak, but I came back with this bot. I sincerely hope you enjoy this and like the story of it ! Basically smut with plot and maybe angst depending on how you navigate the scenario.

If you wish for an xmas bot please write up a request in the comments oh and I’ll take it up to make a bot of the most interesting idea,

Also the art is not owned by me, I found it on rule34 like most other pics on my bots and I don’t even know who made it, it was only tagged as AI.
creator: Nuellex
